# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and protected routes
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /portal
Disallow: /tasks
Disallow: /reports
Disallow: /checkout

# Disallow API endpoints
Disallow: /api/

# Allow search engines to crawl important pages
Allow: /
Allow: /how-it-works
Allow: /pricing
Allow: /trust
Allow: /case-studies
Allow: /free-score
Allow: /privacy
Allow: /terms

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://whoza.ai/sitemap.xml
